title: Free trial plans
excerpt: Are there free trial plans or are they all paid?

posts.author: saidhajj (Saiadhajj)
posts.cookedHtml: Are there free trial plans or are they all paid?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there,

We have a 14-day free trial of our Pro Plan available

You can sign up here, monday.com: Your team's growth made easy | Sign Up.

After the 14 day trial, you can choose one of our paid plans or move to our free plan.
